notableEvents.label: Nick Gonzales GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nick Gonzales grounds into a double play, third baseman Orlando Arcia to second baseman Luke Keaschall to first baseman Josh Bell. Bryan Reynolds out at 2nd. Nick Gonzales out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ryan Kreidler pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Kreidler walks. Luke Keaschall to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Brooks Lee pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brooks Lee walks. Luke Keaschall scores. Ryan Kreidler to 3rd. Byron Buxton to 2nd.
